# Clone brief — Fixture Product

## Authority and authorization

The requester owns the fixture and authorizes local test use under DEC-001.

## Frozen reference baseline

Fixture CLI 1.0 captured under E-001 is the frozen reference.

## Product outcome

ACT-001 invokes WF-001 and receives the fixture response.

## MVP boundary

WF-001 contains REQ-001 only.

## Fidelity decisions

Behavior is exact for REQ-001; all other dimensions are excluded by DEC-001.

## Explicit exclusions

EXC-001 excludes every surface outside REQ-001 under DEC-001.

## Decision ledger

DEC-001 authorizes the fixture scope and local distribution.

## Blockers

UNKNOWN_BLOCKERS: none
